hero.title: Invest in Madrid with Euro Returns.
hero.subtitle:
Real estate in one of Europe's most solid capitals.
High rental demand, legal stability and long-term appreciation.
hero.badge: Up to +8–30% annually in prime zones

about.title: Madrid: European Capital for Real Estate Investment
about.description:
A solid, transparent market backed by one of Europe's most stable economies.
Madrid combines legal security, a strong currency, and constant housing demand for both residential and rental purposes.

market_card.title: MADRID MARKET
market_card.subtitle: Security, liquidity and steady growth in one of Europe's most resilient markets.

puerta_hierro.title: Prime Location — Puerta de Hierro
puerta_hierro.description: Located in one of Madrid's most exclusive and established residential areas, Residencial Zenith combines privacy, natural surroundings and direct connection to the financial and cultural center of the city. Surrounded by green areas like Monte de El Pardo and minutes from major roads, this enclave represents one of the safest and most prestigious locations in the capital.
features: Immediate access to M-30, M-40 and A-6
Close to international schools and universities
puerta_hierro.market_insight: Puerta de Hierro maintains constant demand for premium housing, with high value stability and strong appeal for executive profiles and international families.

los_cerros.title: Strategic Location — Southeast Madrid
los_cerros.description: The project is located in Los Cerros, one of the capital's largest urban developments, conceived as Madrid's future greenest neighborhood. It combines planned expansion, new infrastructure and a privileged natural environment within the Metropolitan Forest.
los_cerros.market_insight: Los Cerros is part of Madrid's structured growth towards the southeast, with low land occupancy and strong investment in infrastructure and green areas, projecting sustained appreciation in the medium and long term.

arturo_soria.title: Prime Location — Arturo Soria, Madrid
arturo_soria.description: Reside Arturo Soria is located at Calle Bausá 13–15, next to the iconic Arturo Soria, one of the most prestigious and established residential arteries in northern Madrid. An enclave that combines exclusivity, high-level residential environment and immediate connection to the financial center and airport.
features: 10 Minutes to Paseo de la Castellana
arturo_soria.market_insight: Arturo Soria is one of the areas with the highest stability and demand in northern Madrid, characterized by its premium residential profile, proximity to international schools and prestigious hospitals, guaranteeing asset protection and sustained real estate liquidity.

unit_types.title: Spaces That Adapt to Your Lifestyle
unit_types.subtitle: From functional apartments to exclusive residences, each typology has been designed to offer comfort, design and sustained value in the Madrid market.

residencial_zenith.title: Residencial Zenith
residencial_zenith.description: Exclusive residential of 117 homes in Puerta de Hierro, with signature architecture and premium common areas in one of Madrid's most prestigious areas.

residencial_ara.title: Residencial ARA
residencial_ara.description: Protected housing from 1 to 4 bedrooms in Los Cerros, Madrid's new sustainable neighborhood, with pool, green areas and garage included in price.

reside_arturo_soria.title: Reside Arturo Soria
reside_arturo_soria.description: Exclusive residential in Arturo Soria, with contemporary architecture, private pool and A energy rating in one of the most prestigious areas of northern Madrid.

presentation.title: Receive the detailed project presentation
presentation.description:
We have prepared a detailed dossier with updated prices, real availability, quality specifications, floor plans and appreciation estimates in the Madrid market.
Includes strategic information for residential buyers and investors looking to protect capital in euros.
presentation.disclaimer:
We will send you the presentation immediately via WhatsApp or email.
No commitment · Clear information · Support in Spanish

why_choose.title: Why investors choose to invest in Madrid with us
why_choose.description: Madrid has established itself as one of the most stable and strategic real estate markets in Europe. Its combination of legal security, strong currency and constant demand makes the Spanish capital a solid destination to protect and grow wealth.
benefits: Thorough analysis of each developer and project
Focus on stability, liquidity and sustained appreciation
Full support through resale or rental management
why_choose.quote: Investing in Madrid is not a trend, it's a wealth strategy.

developers.title: Strategic alliances with Madrid's leading developers
